steps: one tablespoon of tumeric powder and add honey to make it as a paste and apply it. Apply for 15 mins
one tablespoon of multani, add honey and rosewater to make it as paste and Apply for 30 mins.
Apply daily
After Face wash apply honey for overnight.Apply daily
Milk cream(Malai) apply it before bath.
Mix multani mitti with rose water
Apply on oily areas (T-zone)
Apply aloe vera on dry areas
Leave for 15 minutes
Wash with water
tips: Treat oily and dry areas separately

steps: Two tablespoon of onion juice and dilute with water or coconut oil (1 tablespoon).Apply twice a week.
Add 2 or 3 tablespoon of yogurt and one avocado or mix equal parts of honey & yogurt make it as paste and apply it for 30 minutes.
tips: Use mild shampoo, Avoid heat styling

steps: Mash banana, add honey and oil. Apply on hair, wash after 20 minutes.
tips: Use mild shampoo, Avoid heat styling, Use silk pillow

steps: Warm cocunt oil slightly, Apply to scalp and hair and wrap with hot towel. Leave for 20 minutes and wash with mild shampoo.
tips: Use light products, Avoid heavy oils, Use heat for better absorption.

steps: Mix egg and curd, add few drops of lemon juice, Apply evenly on hair. Leave for 20 minutes and wash with cool water.
tips: Maintain weekly care, Avoid over-washing, use mild shampoo.

steps: Take coconut oil and add curry leaves
Boil until leaves turn black
Cool the oil
Apply on scalp
Massage gently
Leave for 30 minutes
Wash with mild shampoo
Banana + honey mask apply for 30 minutes.
tips: Heat styling avoid, Do Deep conditioning

steps: Soak fenugreek over night and grind it as a smooth paste and apply it for 30 minutes or keet it nearly 1hour.
Boil neem leaves in water and let it cool. Grind into paste and mix with coconut oil. Apply on scalp and hair. Leave for 30 minutes, then wash with mild shampoo. Use lice comb after wash.
tips: Repeat twice a week. Keep hair clean and avoid sharing combs.

steps: Mix 2 tablespoons curd with few drops of lemon juice. Apply evenly on face.
Leave for 20 minutes and wash with luke warm water.
tips: Use 2 times a week. Avoid sun exposure after application.

steps: Mix aloe vera gel with cucumber juice and apply gently. Leave for 15 minutes and rinse.
Fill a bowl with cold water and ice cubes. Submerge your face for 15 seconds, repeat this for 3 times
tips: Do in morning for best results. Drink more water and get proper sleep.

steps: Mix equal amounts of castor oil and coconut oil. Warm slightly and apply on scalp.
Massage gently for 10 minutes. Leave for 1 hour or overnight and wash with mild shampoo.
tips: Use twice a week. Helps improve hair thickness and strength.
